zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerard van Zottegem於大約1250年出生在艾歐洛時，他的父親Gerard d'Enghien heer van Zotteghem24歲，母親van Vianen22歲。他和Maria van Gent至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1319年之前。

zh-hans.of,Gent,Gent,Belgium: 比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gerard van Zottegem于大约1250年出生在艾歐洛时，他的父亲Gerard d'Enghien heer van Zotteghem24岁，母亲van Vianen22岁。他和Maria van Gent至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1319年之前。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Gerard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerard van Zottegem was born about 1250, in Europe, his father, Gerard d'Enghien heer van Zotteghem, was 24 and his mother, van Vianen, was 22. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Maria van Gent. He died before 1319.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerard van Zottegem est né environ 1250, à Europe, son père, Gerard d'Enghien heer van Zotteghem, avait 24 ans et sa mère, van Vianen, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Maria van Gent. Il est décédé avant 1319.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gerard van Zottegem um 1250 in Europa geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gerard d'Enghien heer van Zotteghem 24 und seine Mutter van Vianen 22. Er hatte mit Maria van Gent mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 1319.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gerard van Zottegem è nato il circa 1250 nel Europa, il suo padre, Gerard d'Enghien heer van Zotteghem, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, van Vianen, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Maria van Gent. Morì prima del 1319.

ja.Gent, East Flanders, Belgium: ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェント
ja.of,Gent,Gent,Belgium: ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェント
ja.lifeSummary: Gerard van Zottegemが約1250年にヨーロッパで生まれた時，父Gerard d'Enghien heer van Zotteghemは24歳，母van Vianenは22歳であった。彼はMaria van Gentとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1319年以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerard van Zottegem(이)가 대략 1250년 우럽에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gerard d'Enghien heer van Zotteghem(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 van Vianen(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Maria van Gent(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1319년 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerard van Zottegem nasceu aproximadamente 1250, em Europa, seu pai, Gerard d'Enghien heer van Zotteghem, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, van Vianen, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Maria van Gent. Ele faleceu antes 1319.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerard van Zottegem родился около 1250 г. в местности Европа, его отцу по имени Gerard d'Enghien heer van Zotteghem было 24 года, а матери, которую звали van Vianen, 22. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Maria van Gent. Он умер перед 1319 г.

sm.from about 1318 to 1378: mai le e tusa o le 1318 e o'o I le 1378

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gerard van Zottegem nació aproximadamente 1250, en Europa, su papá, Gerard d'Enghien heer van Zotteghem, tenía 24 años y su mamá, van Vianen, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Maria van Gent. Murió antes de 1319.
